title: Well-Known Labels, Annotations and Taints — kubernetes.io/config.hash
text:
Type: Annotation
Example:
kubernetes.io/config.hash: "df7cc47f8477b6b1226d7d23a904867b"
Used on: Pod
When the kubelet creates a static Pod based on a given manifest, it attaches this annotation
to the static Pod. The value of the annotation is the UID of the Pod.
Note that the kubelet also sets the
.spec.nodeName
to the current node name as if the Pod
was scheduled to the node.
